titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/168

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=371 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:42:32.073036+00 | translation moa=372 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:42:33.595415+00

div.p:
Omnibus sancte matris ecclesie filiis presentibus et futuris . Eust' de vesci salutem . Sciant presentes et futuri me concessisse et hac presenti carta mea confirmasse deo
et Sancte Marie de Melros et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus omnes elemosinas et terras quas habuerunt et tenuerunt in feudo me proximo anno
priusquam Alexander filius domini Willelmi Regis Scott' fecit homagium suum Iohanni Regi Anglie in crastino inuentionis sancte crucis . In liberam puram et
perpetuam elemosinam . Scilicet totam quam habuerunt in territorio de Wittun tam ex donatione patricii de ridale quam ex dono roberti
de bernaldebi . et ex dono Gaufridi filii walleui de lillesclif sicut in cartis eorum continetur et eorum autentica testantur . Et totam elemosinam
quam habuerunt in territorio de molle ex dono anselmi de wichetun sicut carte eius testantur . Et totam terram quam habuerunt in territorio de pron
wenseth per compositionem factam a Rege scottie inter domum de Melros et domum de kelchou sicut confirmatio domini Regis de eadem terra testatur.
Quare uolo et precipio ut predicti monachi de melros omnes prefatas terrs et elemosinas habeant teneant et possideant in bosco et plano in pratis et
pascuis et peteriis in moris et maricis Ita libere plene quiete pacifice et honorifice sicut aliquam elemosinam in Regno Scotie quietius plenius et honori
ficentius tenent et possident . Et sicut carte predictorum donatorum rationabiliter testantur et confirmant . His testibus . Roberto de lundon' filio Regis . Willelmo
de ualuns . Dauid marscallo . Bernardo de hauden . Willelmo de turberuile . Reinaldo de capeth' . Radulfo uacca . Ricardo nano . Gaufrido ridel . Ricardo Scotto.
Ricardo de brideshale . Ricardo Gernun . Ricardo de hetun et multis aliis .

p.cl: To All sons of Holy Mother Church present and future, Eustace de Vescy sends greeting.

Let present and future know me to have granted and by this my present charter to have made firm to God and to St Mary at Melrose and the monks serving God in that place all the alms and lands that they had and held in my feu in the year immediately before Alexander son of the lord William, king of the Scots, made his homage to John the king of England on the morrow of the Invention of the Holy Cross; in free, pure, and perpetual alms, that is, the whole of what they had in the territory of Whitton, both from the donation of Patrick of Ryedale and from the gift of Robert of Barnoldby, and from the gift of Geoffrey son of Waldef of Lilliesleaf, as it is contained in their charters and their authentic [deeds] bear witness. And the whole alms that they had in the territory of Mow from the gift of Anselm of Whitton, as his charters bear witness. And the whole land which they had in the territory of Primside by the agreement made by the king of Scotland between the monastic house of Melrose and the monastic house of Kelso as the confirmation of the lord king in respect of the same land bears witness. Wherefore I will and enjoin that the foresaid monks of Melrose have, hold, and possess all the forementioned lands and alms in wood and plain, in meadows and pastures and peateries, in moors and marshes, as freely, fully, quitely, peaceably, and honourably as they quitely, fully, and honourably hold and possess any alms in the kingdom of Scotland.
